parsed.clarification_question: What type of help do you need with this section: (1) conceptual reconstruction or logical consistency, (2) evidence-claim alignment or novelty assessment, (3) structural reorganization, (4) writing polish, or (5) citation and scholarship?

rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is a central expected responsibility in assisting with a research section to ensure limitations and variabilities are transparently communicated.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is central to prevent exaggeration of results and maintain scientific accuracy in the provided help.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is central to keep any assistance focused on the described model's capabilities without unwarranted expansions.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is central to identify and mitigate potential negative impacts from the speech recognition technology discussed.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are central to ensure proper sourcing of benchmarks, metrics, and comparisons in the section.
